allow: PowerShell($helper = git config --get credential.helper; echo "Credential helper: $helper"; $token = git credential fill 2>&1; echo $token)

PowerShell(Set-Location "D:\\ClaudeWork\\BSD56"; $input = "protocol=https`nhost=github.com`n`n"; $token = $input | git credential fill; $password = \($token | Select-String "password="\).ToString\(\).Replace\("password=",""\); if \($password\) { $auth = [System.Convert]::ToBase64String\([System.Text.Encoding]::ASCII.GetBytes\("x:$password"\)\); $headers = @{ Authorization = "Basic $auth"; "Content-Type" = "application/json"; Accept = "application/vnd.github.v3+json" }; $body = @{ title = "feat: 更新週次3–8訓練內容改採高中生友善技術堆疊"; head = "main"; base = "main"; body = "## Summary`n`nUpdated weeks 3-8 with high-school-friendly tech stack.`n`n🤖 Generated with Claude Code" } | ConvertTo-Json; Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "https://api.github.com/repos/thstsai/BSD56/pulls" -Method Post -Headers $headers -Body $body } else { "No token found" })
